title: indurgia polyphylla
intro: Indurgia polyphylla, a plant species also known as the "polyphylla", is a type of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Indurgia polyphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and aid in respiratory health. Indurgia polyphylla is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine, known as Ayurveda.
